description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test the code coverage that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a Python 3.6 matrix, checking out the code, setting up Python, upgrading pip, and installing various dependencies including Z3, Bitwuzla, Capstone, Unicorn, LIEF, and Triton. Finally, run unittests and collect code coverage reports with Codecov.
